title: Help with creating a table style check sheet on Monday.com
excerpt:

posts.author: Tahir01 (Khan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello Monday.com-ers !

I’m creating a check sheet as a table in word and was wondering if this could be created in Monday.com, as it would allow me to track the answers and monitor. I’ve attached a copy as an example and any assistance would be greatly appreciated !

Thank you in advance.

Tahir

Capture935×204 4.08 KB

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Tahir! So sorry for the late response!

Yes, this is definitely possible! The question part would be the name of the item and the “Yes”, “No” and “N/A” columns could be individual Status Column or Dropdown Column labels/answers on a single Status Column or Dropdown Column. The “Comments/Actions” portion can be a Text Column.

We’d also recommend you then set up a monday form for this!

Let us know if you have any questions by sending a message to support@monday.com! Hope this is helpful!

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
